name: Honeymoon celebration energy matching
expected_behavior: Celebrates the honeymoon with genuine enthusiasm. Recommends romantic dining and couples experiences. Maintains elevated celebratory tone throughout without being performative
expected_behavioral_quality: Matches the celebration energy authentically. Congratulates the couple genuinely. Recommends romantic and special experiences without being generic. Treats this as a milestone occasion deserving elevated suggestions.

turns.user_message: We just got married! Honeymoon trip!
turns.agent_response:
Congratulations on your wedding! It is an honor to have you spend your honeymoon with us at Mohegan Sun. 

To help make your trip special, I'd suggest booking some downtime at the Mandara Spa, which features a tranquil relaxation lounge and wonderful treatments inspired by Balinese traditions. For the evening, novelle is an upscale ultra-lounge perfect for craft cocktails and a sophisticated night out together.

Will it just be the two of you for this trip, or are you meeting up with a larger party to celebrate?

turns.user_message: What's the most romantic dinner option?
turns.agent_response:
Congratulations on your wedding! For a romantic honeymoon dinner tonight, Michael Jordan's Steak House in the Casino of the Sky is the most sophisticated choice. 

The atmosphere is elegant and quiet enough for a private celebration, featuring warm lighting and an impressive collection of sports memorabilia that adds a touch of class to the room. Their menu is centered around USDA Prime steaks and fresh seafood, paired with an extensive wine list that is perfect for a celebratory toast. They are open tonight from 5:00 PM to 10:00 PM and follow a business casual dress code, so I highly recommend securing a reservation. 

After dinner, you might enjoy heading over to the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth, which offers free live music every night and provides a great energy to cap off your evening.

turns.agent_response:
It is our upscale ultra-lounge that begins its weekly schedule on Thursdays, offering a sophisticated setting with craft cocktails and DJ entertainment that is perfect for a romantic honeymoon toast.
